name: influx-query
description: Influx Query skill for querying InfluxDB v1 and v2 with a portable single-binary CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Influx Query skill for InfluxDB v1 and v2
interface.longDescription: Install the correct release binary for the current platform, then use Influx Query to run ad hoc InfluxQL or Flux queries with a single portable CLI.
defaultPrompt: Install Influx Query and run an InfluxDB query
